title: I figured out what Elves are - Human Grey Alien Hybrids, or at least us from the future.

transcript.text: Hello, YouTube friends. At the risk of being weird, I do have another weird video to make. I came up with the idea a couple days ago that elves are half-human, half-gray-alien hybrids.
Now, the reason I came up with this idea is because elves are creatures that lots of people think about, so if lots of people envision them in their heads, then they must be real in some level.
So, they're in the Lord of the Rings, so J.R. Tolkien envisioned them in his head. Then you have the Elfquest comic book series, so that person had envisioned them.
And then you have elves, the ones who helped Santa Claus, and I think, I mean, there must be another literature, too, because everybody thinks about elves.
So, now, if you look at them, they kind of look like half-gray-alien, half-human hybrids because, you know, you envision them.
They have bigger eyes than us. They have slighter features, you know, littler noses, smaller lips, smaller face, bigger forehead.
Then they're little and skinnier. And so that's what somebody who's half-gray-alien, half-human would look like, right?
And if you envision them, if people envision them, then they must be a creature that just don't live in this world.
So then where do they live? Well, in another dimension.
So maybe that's where the half-human, half-gray-alien hybrids live, in another dimension, a higher dimension than us, because they're, I guess, more advanced than us.
So I got this idea, because I had a dream a few days ago, where I was, I had an interesting dream that I was in a plane.
And I was at this big outdoor party, which was really cool, and then I was in this plane that was flying over the ground at, like, 20 miles an hour.
And then I went in the plane, and then the plane had a basement, which kind of is interesting, because it's kind of like, you know, those spaceships.
And you go in the spaceships, and the spaceship has a lot more space inside than what you can see outside, because they take up space in another dimension.
So maybe it was something like that.
But anyways, I was at this outdoor party, and then this girl kind of pulls me outside, and she's all, like, acting kind of weird, like, crying, like, saying,
Oh, I miss you, like, I want you to be together, or something like this.
And I didn't say, I didn't say anything, and then I woke up.
And then I thought about it, like, the next day, and I was looking at, I didn't really notice it when I was looking at her, but she wasn't human.
And, like, this girl, uh, looked like an elf.
So maybe I was in dreamland, talking to an elf that was in dreamland.
Uh, and I've seen, like, pictures of Bashar, the alien, the, uh, Sathani.
And they kind of look kind of like an elf.
So anyways, there you go.
